parameters.query: SELECT project_name, cro_score, recommendation, created_at FROM bridge.cro_evaluations WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24h' ORDER BY cro_score DESC
SELECT project_name, outcome, cro_score, actual_revenue_usd FROM bridge.project_memory WHERE updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7d' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 10

WITH adj AS (
  SELECT
    unnest($1::text[]) AS agent_name,
    unnest($2::integer[]) AS delta
)
UPDATE bridge.agent_performance ap
SET authority_level = GREATEST(1, LEAST(10, ap.authority_level + adj.delta))
FROM adj
WHERE ap.agent_name = adj.agent_name
  AND ap.date = CURRENT_DATE
RETURNING ap.agent_name, ap.authority_level;
